title: SHC Wardenite Armor
description: Convert the netherite armor into a warden armor!
body:
Optifine Optional.

This pack change the netherite armor and netherite armor items textures to look like a warden themed armor.
 
Also this pack have a CIT version on the you just need to put the word "Warden" in a netherite armor for obtain the warden armor.

Have a nice day!
